title: Western Myth Codex
public_claim: This bundle translates a previously delivered blueprint and patch doctrine into literal code stubs for a MuranoOS-native Phase I admitted room shell — the Western Myth Codex.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Western Myth Codex, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
